first_line: O my true friend! Numerous letters dated the fourth of Rabi'u'l-Avval 1325 were received, but due to the multitude [3.5s]... ...Announce of my behalf respectful greeting to the maidservant of God, Madam..., and say: Praise be to God! That thy house hath become the nest and shelter

translations.text:
## TEŠKOĆE

Ima li ikog sem Boga ko može ukloniti nedaće? Recite: Hvala Bogu! On je Bog! Svi su Njegove sluge, i svi se pokoravaju Njegovoj zapovesti!
translations.name: TEŠKOĆE
